strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with 20 years of software engineering experience across multiple platforms and domains
Demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative as founder of GISCollective, a production-deployed open-source platform still active
Shows commitment to technical mentorship and knowledge sharing through multiple workshops, talks, and community engagement
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or products despite role being explicitly focused on 'AI Strategy' — current re:cinq work mentions 'AI-agent infrastructure' vaguely with no concrete achievements
Career trajectory shows Senior/Staff IC roles but lacks evidence of director-level strategic influence, platform vision, or principal engineer scope required for this role
Missing preferred advanced degree in AI (Master's/PhD), no advisory background with customers/partners on technology adoption, and minimal cloud platform emphasis despite being core to role
response.justification: Bogdan has solid engineering depth with 20 years of experience and genuine entrepreneurial credentials (GISCollective). However, this role specifically requires principal-engineer expertise in AI strategy, and his resume shows no significant AI/ML work, no recognized AI platform or product, and no evidence of the director-level strategic influence needed to advise customers on cloud/AI adoption. His current re:cinq title is 'Staff Software Engineer' with vague mention of 'AI-agent infrastructure,' but no portfolio of AI products or demonstrated expertise in the AI domain. His strength lies in full-stack engineering and technical leadership of teams, not strategic AI innovation.
